// Generated by bpmn-to-code
package de.emaarco.example.types;

import java.lang.String;
import java.util.List;

public class BpmnRelations {
  public final String name;

  /**
   * IDs of BPMN elements (not sequence flows) that directly precede this element. Use {@code Flows} to traverse the connecting sequence flows.
   */
  public final List<String> previousElements;

  /**
   * IDs of BPMN elements (not sequence flows) that directly follow this element. Use {@code Flows} to traverse the connecting sequence flows.
   */
  public final List<String> followingElements;

  public final String parentId;

  public final String attachedToRef;

  public final List<String> attachedElements;

  public BpmnRelations(String name, List<String> previousElements, List<String> followingElements,
      String parentId, String attachedToRef, List<String> attachedElements) {
    this.name = name;
    this.previousElements = previousElements;
    this.followingElements = followingElements;
    this.parentId = parentId;
    this.attachedToRef = attachedToRef;
    this.attachedElements = attachedElements;
  }
}
